attributes.action: Board of Peace Rejection - Spend the £739 Million on UK National Health Service
attributes.background: This is a US presidents vanity project and the UK government should decline to join as it requires a vast entry sum of £739 Million ($1 M) with no guarentees of success and directly suborns the United Nations which has an overwhelmining  membership of 193 countries.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758144
